subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Makayo-kayo: ke musango wa biñambwanembwa waimena pa kuuba kupichila mu
topics: ba nkaizhi kabiji ne kukilapo. Uno musango unembewa mujishinda ja minsambo
pakachi kabankaizhi apa bino ne pa kukaila.
Nemba nsansawilo ipi pa kachi ka bipelu bina ne bitanu na kamo.
Nemba mwinsambo mwipi pakachi ka bankaizhi babiji
